data.user_prompt: Who builds bespoke business automation and custom operational software (workflow automation, audit trails, anomaly detection, analytics) for companies in South Africa? Name specific firms and their websites.

sections.text:
Here are **South African firms that build bespoke business automation and custom operational software** (workflow automation, audit trails, anomaly detection, analytics), plus their websites.

---

### 1. Business Automation

- **What they do:** As the name suggests, they focus specifically on **bespoke business automation** solutions in South Africa, with examples across sectors like golf clubs, property administration, and fire services.[1]  
- **Relevance to you:** Custom back-office systems, workflow automation, admin systems, and operational tools tailored to specific industries.[1]  
- **Website:** **business-automation.co.za**[1]

---

### 2. Co-Foundry

- **What they do:** South African firm specializing in **custom workflow automation and business process software**, with a full team of developers, designers and project managers.[3]  
- **Relevance:** Custom workflow automation systems, operational platforms and internal tools for companies needing tailored software rather than off‑the‑shelf products.[3]  
- **Website:** **co-foundry.co.za**[3]

---

### 3. Haefele Software

- **What they do:** **Software engineering consultancy** with offices in South Africa and the UK, experienced in Microsoft tech and both **legacy and greenfield systems**.[3]  
- **Relevance:** Good fit for **workflow automation**, integration with existing Microsoft stacks, and custom line-of-business apps.[3]  
- **Website:** **haefele.io** (domain referenced via the Co‑Foundry comparison list).[3]

---

### 4. KRS (Khanyisa Real Systems)

- **What they do:** Long-established **Agile custom software development house** in South Africa (operating since 1987), specialising in Microsoft technologies.[3]  
- **Relevance:** Custom enterprise systems, **workflow automation**, analytics dashboards, and operational tools for medium–large organisations.[3]  
- **Website:** **krs.co.za**[3]

---

### 5. SIVOXI

- **What they do:** South African **software development powerhouse** offering custom software, **AI, machine learning and robotics**, with ISO 9001:2015 certification.[3][4]  
- **Relevance:** Ideal if you want **AI‑driven workflow automation**, anomaly detection, predictive analytics or intelligent audit/monitoring systems.[3][4]  
- **Website:** **sivoxi.com**[3][4]

---

### 6. Specno

- **What they do:** Primarily a **mobile app and web application developer** that also offers **digital transformation and workflow automation** services.[3]  
- **Relevance:** Good if your workflow or operational system needs strong mobile UX plus ongoing support.[3]  
- **Website:** **specno.com**[3]

---

### 7. Signature Business Solutions (Signature Group)

- **What they do:** Fintech‑oriented **business automation** and reporting solutions.[5] They provide dashboards, **business activity monitoring, automated alerts, threshold reporting, pattern recognition**, financial reporting packs and more.[5]  
- **Relevance:** Strong fit if you need **anomaly detection in financial/transactional data**, automated reconciliations, KPI dashboards, and audit‑friendly reporting in large organisations.[5]  
- **Website:** **signaturegroup.co.za**[5]

---

### 8. AI Automated Solutions

- **What they do:** South African **AI automation consultancy** focused on agentic AI agents, chatbots, WhatsApp bots, CRM automation and **custom AI‑driven software** for local businesses.[6]  
- **Relevance:** Good for **AI‑based workflow automation**, automated customer journeys, CRM updates, lead handling, and back‑office automations; they also quote on **larger custom CRM/back‑office builds**.[6]  
- **Website:** **aiautomatedsolutions.co.za**[6]

---

### 9. Ditstek Innovations (South Africa presence)

- **What they do:** **Custom software development company** with operations in South Africa, delivering AI‑powered, scalable and secure tailored solutions.[9]  
- **Relevance:** Bespoke web and enterprise applications, potentially including **workflow automation, analytics and AI/ML components** depending on your brief.[9]  
- **Website:** **ditstek.com** (South Africa section).[9]

---

### 10. Additional South African bespoke/BPM-focused providers

From a business process management and custom solutions directory, these companies are listed as South African providers delivering **bespoke software or business process optimisation**, which often includes workflow automation and operational platforms:[7]

- **Dariel Software** – “South African tech experts delivering **bespoke software solutions**, unlocking business potential through digital acceleration.”[7]  
  - Website: **dariel.co.za**[7]

- **Ovations** – Focuses on **value‑driven technological evolution of core business**, including BPM and process solutions.[7]  
  - Website: **ovationsgroup.com**[7]

- **Ulwembu Business Services** – Management consulting and ICT services helping organisations become **optimised, digitised businesses**.[7]  
  - Website: **ulwembu.com**[7]

- **emediaIT** – Technology solutions and **software development company** providing custom solutions and support.[7]  
  - Website: **emediait.com**[7]

- **Twenty57** – Develops **industrial-strength applications and software for the financial services industry**, often with strong data and workflow components.[7]  
  - Website: **twenty57.com**[7]

These are particularly relevant if you are in financial services, corporates, or need heavier BPM/enterprise architecture around your automation.

---

If you tell me your industry, team size, and whether you prioritise AI/anomaly detection vs. classic workflow + audit trails, I can narrow this list to a short “best‑fit” subset and suggest who to contact first.
